The Fukui function analysis for phenol was carried out using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`) in the gas phase. 

Calculated Fukui indices identify the most electrophilic site (C at atom index 2) with a Fukui-plus value of 2.10283 and the most nucleophilic site (O at atom index 0) with a Fukui-minus value of 0.16201.
